content_of_post_to_answer: What's the best way to stay calm and focused if something goes wrong during a big exam like IIT JEE?
answer: When something goes wrong in an exam like JEE, the real damage isn’t the mistake but the silent switch from solving to self-monitoring. Most students start tracking how badly it’s going, which consumes working memory. Treat each question as independent recovery space; you’re not repairing a paper, just collecting remaining marks. I’ve written more on this pattern on my profile, if you want to go deeper.
